subcodes.first_line: O dear one of 'Abdu'l-Bahá, for some time I have not written a letter to you, due to lack of opportunity and ill health [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای عزیز عبدالبهاء چندی بود که نامه بشما ننگاشتم سبب عدم مجال و اعتلال مزاج
subcodes.subjects: @travels to the West by Abdu'l-Baha, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @suffering and imprisonment, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
